inputs.name: B
inputs.desc: Weight matrix [N, K] (row-major, transposed logical layout)

outputs.name: C
outputs.desc: Output matrix [M, N] = A @ B^T + bias

constraints.notes: Exact FP32 NT GEMM that preserves the scalar accumulation order used for parity-sensitive header paths.

impl.c_declaration: void gemm_naive_parallel(const float *A, const float *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K);

notes: Generic exact FP32 NT GEMM for parity-sensitive matmuls such as image patch projection.
